narrative:
Cols 49-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,258 registered voters, with 67.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.6 percentage points.
